title: ThresholdIQ
one_liner: Dynamic free-shipping bar with per-cart math
wedge: Bar reads live cart and presents per-cart threshold mathematically tuned to next AOV tier from store order-distribution histogram

title: LookCart
one_liner: Auto-generated Complete the Look from real co-purchase data
wedge: Reads last-90-day actual co-purchase pairs + product image embeddings, auto-publishes 3-product looks per PDP — zero curation labour

title: FittingRoom3D
one_liner: No-3D-model-required AR for apparel: AI generates a wearable 3D mesh from 3 product photos and deploys it to PDP in 24 hours
wedge: Merchant uploads 3 product photos (front, back, side); AI reconstructs a drape-capable 3D garment mesh via generative 3D pipeline and publishes the AR try-on to the PDP within 24 hours — no 3D artist needed.

title: PixelCart
one_liner: Vision-grounded "Shop this look"
wedge: GPT-4o vision decomposes any uploaded lifestyle image into structured semantic attributes (garment type, occasion, material, era) and queries the catalogue against those attributes — not feature-vector similarity, actual understanding ("relaxed linen blazer for spring") in <2s.

title: CartGenius
one_liner: Dynamic bundle rebundler: cart auto-optimizes for best price using Shopify Functions
wedge: Uses Shopify Functions Cart Transform API (2024) to automatically detect when a customer's cart qualifies for a bundle discount they haven't applied, then presents a one-click "rebundle for $X less" offer — saving the merchant margin while lifting perceived value.

title: Wholesale One
one_liner: B2B pricing in 30 minutes, not 3 weeks
wedge: Flat €49/mo includes tiered pricing + tax-exempt flags + MOQ + net-30 invoice link + B2B-only catalog — one app, one price, 30-minute setup from CSV

title: Bundle Coach / AI Bundle Builder
one_liner: Auto-generated bundles from collections
wedge: Ingests the store's collections + last-90-days order data and auto-generates 5–10 bundle proposals each week — name, copy, hero image stitched from product photos — that the merchant approves via swipe-UI like Tinder.

title: ZeroPage
one_liner: AI-matched alternative on OOS & 404 pages
wedge: Theme app extension intercepts OOS + 404 pages and renders top-3 in-stock matches as a "Similar picks" card scored via lightweight embedding (text-embedding-3-small) — recovering revenue from pages that previously returned €0.

title: CheckoutPulse
one_liner: Live social proof in the checkout extension
wedge: Drag-and-drop checkout block rendering "47 people bought today" + one pinned 5-star review relevant to the cart SKU + trust badges — pure social proof at the moment before Pay, where trust panic peaks.

title: QuizCart
one_liner: Product recommendation quiz embedded inside Shopify checkout extensions, killing Octane AI's $50+ engagement-metered entry
wedge: (one sentence):** Move the product-fit quiz from a pre-purchase landing page (where Octane lives) into a Shopify checkout extension widget — so the recommendation happens at peak purchase intent, after a customer has already added to cart but before they complete payment, lifting AOV and reducing post-purchase returns.

title: SessionMind
one_liner: Real-time persona engine reshuffling PDP mid-session
wedge: Lightweight JS agent builds live behavioral profile from 3 pageviews; hosted small LLM classifies into merchant-defined personas ("gift-giver", "performance seeker"); PDP swaps hero/CTA/social proof in <300ms — first-time visitor sees a page shaped for them, not a static template.

title: FlashFair
one_liner: Randomized flash sale: a mystery discount fires for N minutes, customers must act blind
wedge: Merchant schedules "blind flash events" — at a random moment within a window (e.g., sometime between 2–4pm Tuesday), a site-wide or collection-level mystery discount fires for exactly 15 minutes, announced only by a live storefront banner with no pre-announcement — creating genuine urgency and habitual site check behavior.

title: GuessRight
one_liner: Reverse quiz: guess the match, unlock a discount if correct
wedge: Customer is shown a product and asked to guess the right attribute (ingredient, material, origin, flavor) — if correct, a discount unlocks; if wrong, a recommendation is surfaced. Combines product education with a gamified conversion moment.

title: PageRankReviews
one_liner: Lightweight, server-side-rendered review widget that adds zero JavaScript to page load and costs 1/10th of Yotpo
wedge: (one sentence):** Render review star ratings and the first 5 reviews as native Shopify Liquid/Metafield HTML with zero external JavaScript on page load — full widget defers async only when user scrolls to the reviews section — priced at $29/mo vs. Yotpo's $79/mo.

title: AdProof
one_liner: Turns your best review photos + text into ready-to-launch Meta and TikTok ad creatives inside Shopify
wedge: (one sentence):** Pull your top-rated photo reviews (sorted by photo quality score + star rating), auto-compose them into Meta-formatted static ads and TikTok-formatted video testimonial clips, and push directly to your connected ad account — no agency, no Canva.

title: CommissionKit
one_liner: Reviews × Referral: reviewer gets an automatic referral commission code after posting
wedge: After a 4- or 5-star review is submitted, auto-generate a unique referral code for that customer with a commission (store credit or cash via Shopify Payouts) — every happy reviewer instantly becomes a micro-affiliate.

title: CartCanvas
one_liner: Branded cart drawer with "Your Haul" share card
wedge: A "Share Your Haul" button generates a 9:16 PNG mosaic of the cart contents, styled to the brand's aesthetic, with a referral QR — turning every checkout into a Stories-ready brand post.

title: ExchangeUp
one_liner: "While your return is in transit, here's $X to spend now" store-credit nudge app
wedge: (one sentence):** Give any Shopify store — not just Loop Advanced subscribers — the ability to issue an instant "spend-now" store credit the moment a return label is scanned, with a time-limited "use within 48 hours" prompt that drives an immediate second purchase before the refund even processes.

title: Return-to-Resale Router
one_liner: Routes every return by rules (condition, reason, current stock, channel margin) into the highest-margin destination — exchange, keep-it discount, liquidation queue, or resale-ready — with a visual mar
wedge: Routes every return by rules (condition, reason, current stock, channel margin) into the highest-margin destination — exchange, keep-it discount, liquidation queue, or resale-ready — with a visual margin dashboard showing "if you'd kept these as resale not refunded: +€2,140 last month."

title: FounderVoice
one_liner: Cloned-founder voice Q&A on every PDP
wedge: A 60-second voice-clone onboarding produces a founder voice model; GPT-4o Realtime API answers shopper questions on-page in that voice, grounded in product catalog + brand FAQ.

title: POSReturn Pro
one_liner: Shopify POS return UX overhaul with flexible refund-method routing
wedge: Replaces the POS return flow with a step-by-step wizard that forces staff to choose refund destination before processing, adds a 2-minute void window, and re-routes loyalty-coupon orders correctly.

title: HybridSave
one_liner: "One-off + Subscribe & Save" layer that adds a discount toggle to any Shopify product without replacing the checkout
wedge: A lightweight widget that adds a "Subscribe & Save X%" radio button to any product page; when selected, creates a Shopify selling plan with a discount — no customer portal, no subscription management app, no dunning complexity — just the toggle and the first repeat charge.

title: SubscriptPerk
one_liner: Subscription tier with rotating monthly perks using Selling Plans API
wedge: Merchants define a "perk calendar" — month 1: free sample, month 2: early access, month 3: exclusive colorway — and the app automatically surfaces the current perk via checkout extension and fulfills it alongside the subscription order.

title: ChurnShield
one_liner: Subscription × Loyalty: loyalty tier bonuses that activate when a subscriber tries to cancel
wedge: When a subscriber initiates cancellation, instantly display their loyalty tier, points balance, and a tier-specific win-back offer ("You're 120 points from Gold status — stay one more month and we'll upgrade you") — turning the cancel screen into a loyalty upgrade pitch.

title: TrioSocial
one_liner: Loyalty × Referral × Gift: the three social-spend levers in one dashboard
wedge: One customer profile shows loyalty tier + referral history + gift card balance; one campaign tool lets merchants run "refer a friend AND gift them a welcome credit AND earn bonus points" flows — impossible today without three separate apps.

title: FaireBreak
one_liner: Move your stockists off Faire and onto your own direct B2B portal
wedge: (one sentence):** Strip away Faire's 15% commission by giving Shopify merchants a one-click "migrate your Faire stockists" tool — a branded B2B portal that imports existing retailer relationships, sends personalized "order direct" invitations, and tracks which buyers have converted off Faire.

title: Replenishment Drawer
one_liner: Per-customer replenishment timing
wedge: Per-customer per-SKU consumption model (LLM seeded with category defaults, refined from observed reorder intervals) sends a "your moisturiser is almost empty" SMS at the predicted moment with a one-tap reorder that builds a cart from anything red on the customer's "vanity shelf."

title: RechargeRecovery
one_liner: Failed-payment dunning engine for Recharge that goes beyond email to SMS, push, and smart retry sequencing
wedge: Intercepts Recharge failed-charge webhooks and runs a smart multi-channel recovery sequence: Visa/MC Account Updater API first, then SMS (Postscript/Klaviyo), then email with payment-update link, then pause-vs-cancel decision based on LTV tier.

title: DunningDesk
one_liner: Standalone failed-payment recovery tool for merchants on any subscription app, priced per-save not per-month
wedge: Plug into any subscription app via Shopify webhook; detect failed billing events; run a 7-step smart recovery sequence (email + SMS, escalating with a discount offer at attempt 4); charge a success fee ($1 per recovered subscription) on top of a low monthly base.

title: ScheduleStack
one_liner: Shopify Email send-time intelligence: per-segment optimal send-time prediction using first-party open data
wedge: Analyzes historical Shopify Email open timestamps per customer segment (VIP, first-time buyers, lapsed) and schedules each campaign cohort to deploy at the predicted peak engagement window — not a batch blast at 10am Tuesday.

title: SMSFlat
one_liner: Per-message SMS marketing for sub-$500K stores at a flat monthly cap, not per-send pricing
wedge: Flat monthly SMS allowance with no per-message surprise billing; pre-built Shopify flows (abandoned cart, shipping update, win-back) that install in one click, designed for a solo-founder who has never run SMS before.

title: CastingCall Live
one_liner: Realtime live-video shopping where the merchant streams a product demo and shoppers interrupt with voice questions answered by AI in real time (no extra staff needed)
wedge: Merchant starts a live product stream from Shopify admin; shoppers watch embedded in-store, ask voice or text questions, and an AI layer — grounded in the product catalog — answers immediately without the merchant having to pause their demo.

title: PrivyEscape
one_liner: Shopify Email pop-up and list migration tool for merchants leaving Privy's rising-price trap
wedge: Exports all Privy pop-up designs as Shopify-native theme app extensions, maps all Privy email flows to Shopify Email automations, and migrates the subscriber list with suppression-list preservation — complete escape in one workflow.

title: FlowSegment
one_liner: Shopify Email automation targeting that breaks the 100-customer Flow loop ceiling
wedge: Replaces the broken Flow batching hack with a proper queue-and-drip engine that iterates through any customer segment size, 100 at a time, with de-duplication and retry logic.

title: Catalog-to-Creative
one_liner: AI static + video ads from product feed
wedge: The product image is locked as a non-negotiable mask before any generation — diffusion can only change the scene around it, never the product itself — so logos stay intact, prints stay sharp, and every output is paid-ad-ready without retouching.

title: CreativeRack
one_liner: AI ad-creative variant generator with one-click Meta launch
wedge: (one sentence):** Connect to the Shopify product catalog, auto-generate 5 hook/copy/image variants per product using GPT-4o + product photos, then push the winning test directly into Meta Ads Manager with one click — replacing both the creative brief and the media buyer's setup time.

title: AdCreativeQuick
one_liner: Repurpose product images into feed ads
wedge: Upload product image → AI picks 3 best crops, adds copy, exports 16:9 + 1:1 + carousel in 15 seconds

title: SupplyPilot
one_liner: Inventory replenishment agent that drafts and sends supplier POs automatically
wedge: SupplyPilot watches stock levels vs. a configurable reorder point, calculates the right quantity using 90-day velocity, drafts a professional PO email, shows the merchant a one-click approve/decline screen, and fires the email to the supplier on approval.

title: ListingGuard
one_liner: Catalog health agent that audits your Shopify store daily for broken links, missing images, and out-of-policy listings
wedge: The agent crawls the merchant's full catalog every night: checks for missing alt text (hurts SEO), broken product images (kills conversions), zero-inventory published products (wastes ad spend), duplicate meta titles (cannibalises SEO), and prices below cost (misconfigured discounts). Sends a morning "fix list" with the exact products affected and one-click bulk fixes for common issues.

title: RetailIQ
one_liner: Merchant health scorecard + churn prediction
wedge: Weekly 2-minute scorecard with category-normalized benchmarks and AI-flagged 1-2 most impactful metrics to act on

title: NightWatch
one_liner: Competitor price agent that re-prices your SKUs while you sleep
wedge: NightWatch is the first fully closed-loop repricing agent for Shopify — it watches competitors, fires the Shopify Admin API price mutation, and emails the merchant a plain-English digest of every change made and why.

title: Birthday & Beyond
one_liner: Occasion marketing with beautiful moments
wedge: Six pre-built design-led occasion moments (birthday, first-anniversary, 10th order, year-with-us, lapsed-90, season-opener) — each a fully composed animated card that customers screenshot and share, not a coupon-blast email.

title: Occasion OS
one_liner: One-click occasion launches
wedge: Pick "Mother's Day 2026 — May 10" from a dropdown and get a complete occasion stack — landing page, countdown, "shop by recipient" filter, gift-message capture, delivery-cutoff badge, email/SMS sequence — deployed in 20 minutes with next year pre-filling from this year's results.

title: Unwrap
one_liner: Designer gift-wrap templates on the PDP
wedge: 25 designer wrap templates (kraft + twine, holographic Y2K, editorial monochrome, botanical pressed, minimal noshi, foil-embossed) — each fully composed on PDP showing the actual product wrapped with the buyer's message hand-rendered, with a 26th template auto-built from the brand's colorway.

title: SupplementStack
one_liner: "Your goal" ingredient quiz + subscription stacker for wellness DTC stores
wedge: A 4-question goal quiz (energy / sleep / muscle / immunity) that assembles a personalized supplement protocol from the store's catalog, with subscription-plan pricing embedded in the recommendation — capturing the "what should I take?" question that supplement buyers Google before abandoning DTC.

title: Fit-Me
one_liner: AI size recommender for apparel under $500K
wedge: Customer enters height/weight/usual brand → app returns a confidence-scored size recommendation computed from the store's actual sold-order/exchange data — not a generic chart, the merchant's own data become the brand-specific fit model.

title: GorgiasLite
one_liner: $19/mo Shopify helpdesk for stores under $1M rev that Gorgias prices out
wedge: Flat monthly price with unlimited tickets (within reasonable fair-use cap), Shopify order lookup in sidebar, canned responses, and basic macros — no AI upsells, no per-ticket surprises.

title: TrackReply
one_liner: Customer service agent that auto-resolves "where is my order?" tickets 24/7
wedge: Connects to Shopify Orders + carrier tracking APIs; when a customer emails/DMs "where is my order?" the agent looks up their order, checks live tracking, drafts a personalised reply with the exact status and ETA, and sends it — with zero human in the loop for standard WISMO cases.

title: Restock OS
one_liner: Wishlist + back-in-stock + preorder unified
wedge: One PDP widget auto-chooses between Save / Notify / Pre-order based on inventory state — turning three apps merchants already pay for separately into a single unified "demand inbox" that broadcasts when stock lands.

title: HabitatKit
one_liner: Species-specific setup builder for reptile stores
wedge: "Build My Habitat" wizard — species → enclosure size → experience level — surfaces correct enclosure, substrate, UVB fixture at right wattage, supplements as real SKUs with one-click "Add Full Kit" purchase.
